register.title: Join us
register.subtitle: Start your training with GymSystem today.

landing_page.description_1: GymSystem is an ecosystem that connects three modern facilities with one cohesive digital platform. Book, pay, and track your progress — all in one place.
landing_page.description_2: No more paper contracts, waiting in lines, or losing memberships. Your access is always on your phone.
landing_page.locations_desc: In key points of the region, always close to you.
landing_page.booking_desc: Sign up for classes with a single tap.
landing_page.app_desc: Your membership, schedule, and progress, in your pocket.
landing_page.description: Don't believe in boring workouts? Neither do we. We offer dozens of classes led by passionate instructors, tailored to every fitness level.
landing_page.strength_desc: Build the shape of your life. Strength training, CrossFit, and Body Pump to sculpt your physique and boost your power.
landing_page.cardio_desc: Rev up your metabolism to the max. Dynamic HIIT, Tabata, and boxing classes that will leave you dripping in sweat but happy.
landing_page.mind_body_desc: Find your balance. Yoga, Pilates, and deep stretching will improve your mobility, breathing, and help you recover.
landing_page.transparent_desc: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
landing_page.find_club: Find your club on the map (30 locations)
landing_page.join_desc: Join over 1200 people who already train with GymSystem. First 30 days are free.
landing_page.guarantees: No credit card · Cancel anytime · Full access for 30 days
